# Context Loader

> System for selecting and loading context modules into a coding agent's workspace.

## Platform
- [platform/src/server.py](platform/src/server.py) — FastAPI web app serving the module picker UI and load endpoint
- [platform/src/templates/index.html](platform/src/templates/index.html) — Module picker HTML template
- [platform/deploy/Dockerfile](platform/deploy/Dockerfile) — Container image definition
- [platform/deploy/docker-compose.yml](platform/deploy/docker-compose.yml) — Docker Compose config

## Docs
- [docs/plans/01-filebrowser-quantum.md](docs/plans/01-filebrowser-quantum.md) — Plan: FileBrowser Quantum
- [docs/plans/02-claude-code-agent.md](docs/plans/02-claude-code-agent.md) — Plan: Claude Code agent
- [docs/plans/03-varlock-secrets.md](docs/plans/03-varlock-secrets.md) — Plan: Varlock secrets
- [docs/plans/04-cli-cmux.md](docs/plans/04-cli-cmux.md) — Plan: CLI with cmux
- [docs/plans/05-infisical-integration.md](docs/plans/05-infisical-integration.md) — Plan: Infisical secret management integration
- [docs/plans/06-git-module-loading.md](docs/plans/06-git-module-loading.md) — Plan: Git-based module loading from remote repos
- [docs/plans/07-demo-modules-repo.md](docs/plans/07-demo-modules-repo.md) — Plan: Standalone demo modules repo

## Guides
- [docs/guides/infisical-setup.md](docs/guides/infisical-setup.md) — Step-by-step Infisical setup for module secrets
- [docs/guides/git-module-loading-test.md](docs/guides/git-module-loading-test.md) — Testing GitHub API module loading with a private repo and token

## Reference
- [STATUS.md](STATUS.md) — Project overview, architecture, and current state
